TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-19-2006 IN DEPT. 514, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR (1) RECONSIDERATION OF DENIAL OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND/OR (2) RENEWED MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT GRANTED. JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION SHALL BE ENTERED FOR PLAINTIFF AND JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY AGAINST DEFENDANTS, THE GOGGINS, IN THE SUM OF $155,000.00 AND AGAINST DEFENDANT MARQUEZ IN THE SUM OF $81,000.00. JUDGE THOMAS J. MELLON, JR., CLERK: V. MACK, REPORTER: JUNE LEATHLEY CSR 1629
DUP ENTRY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STEWARD, ALLAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOGGIN & GOGGIN GOGGIN, TERRENCE GOGGIN, PATRICK MARQUEZ, VICTOR PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE AND RECOVER THE SUM OF $155,000.00 JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY FROM DEFENDANTS THE GOGGINS AND PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE AND RECOVER THE SUM OF $81,000.00 FROM DEFENDANT MARQUEZ. AS PREVAILING PARTY, PLAINTIFF SHALL ALSO RECOVER HIS COSTS FROM DEFENDANTS, AND EACH OF THEM, IN SUCH AMOUNT AS MAY SUBSEQUENTLY BE FIXED, INCLUDING SUCH ATTORNEY FEES AS MAY SUBSEQUENTLY BE AWARDED BY ORDER OF THIS COURT PURSUANT TO AND IN ACCORD WITH THE STIPULATION. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
